root_text.an3.152:1.2: visamena kāyakammena, visamena vacīkammena, visamena manokammena …pe….
root_text.an3.152:2.2: samena kāyakammena, samena vacīkammena, samena manokammena …pe….

translation_text.an3.152:1.1: “When a foolish, incompetent untrue person has three qualities they keep themselves broken and damaged. …
translation_text.an3.152:1.2: Unethical deeds by way of body, speech, and mind. …
translation_text.an3.152:2.1: When an astute, competent true person has three qualities they keep themselves intact and unscathed. …
translation_text.an3.152:2.2: Ethical deeds by way of body, speech, and mind. …”
